title: Inifinite loop in INSERT statement.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), age INT CHECK(age >= 0));
INSERT INTO tab2 (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
INSERT INTO tab2 (id, name) SELECT 1, 'David' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tab2 WHERE id = 1);
key_bug_features: INSERT statement causes infinite loop in SQLite
